name: looper
description: Decompose beads, write tight Codex orchestration loops, and phone a senior SWE for research-backed decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Decompose beads, write loops, phone a SWE.
interface.longDescription: Looper writes compact Codex orchestration loops over plans, beads, slices, subagents, review/fix passes, and proof. It also includes Beadwriter for decomposing parent beads, PRDs, issue briefs, and grill-with-docs output into commit-sized childbeads, plus Phone-A-SWE for research-backed software decisions in systems-engineering terms. Looper's default code lanes require Matt Pocock Skills because they call matt-pocock-skills:implement and matt-pocock-skills:code-review.
defaultPrompt: Use Looper to write a Codex loop.
Use Beadwriter to decompose this bead.
Turn this plan into implementation slices.
Write a loop using Matt Pocock skill lanes.
Use Phone-A-SWE to research this technical decision.
